title: Create Craft
description: 1.20.1 Modpack, which is all about the Mod Create
body:
![The main font... ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4f78e4bfdab0df946711e11a9e4a79c68286043d.png)

> The intention of Create Craft was to create a lightweight modpack so that new players can easily understand modpacks without being overloaded with modifications.

> Through a unique world generation, the modpack is more than just vanilla+.
